summary: Frontend verification of (a) Returns badge wording fix and (b) new Apply Debit Notes section + live net-billing math in Stock-Out Record Delivery dialog. ALL CHECKS PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: DeliveriesTab.jsx is 2639 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline; consider splitting (account picker, credit-notes section, debit-notes section, net-billing summary, items grid) into smaller components for maintainability.

Customer Returns global page shows distributor column as '-' for all rows even though data exists in distributor-scoped view (Brian's grid resolves them). Out of scope for this iteration but worth tracking.
seed_data_creation: None — relied on pre-existing Empire Restaurant (5 outstanding debit notes ₹450 total) and RET-2026-0001..0007.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Account typeahead in Record Delivery dialog uses [data-testid='delivery-account-option-{account_id}']. Empire Restaurant id is d4e2187a-5e7d-4847-902b-b6699ae910fc. Clicking via .click() on the testid works; .evaluate(el => el.click()) does NOT trigger React onClick. Location dropdown uses [data-testid='delivery-location-select']. SKU combobox in item row has no testid (use nth(1) of dialog comboboxes).
